subject: [PATCH v5 08/21] nfsd: use RCU to protect fi_deleg_file

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch protects the fi_deleg_file pointer in the NFS server code using RCU (Read-Copy Update) to prevent concurrent access issues during delegation teardown. It annotates the pointer with __rcu and converts all accessors to use proper RCU primitives, such as rcu_assign_pointer() for stores and rcu_dereference_protected() for reads under a lock or where stability is guaranteed. This patch prepares for a subsequent change that will safely acquire a reference from the CB_NOTIFY callback path without holding the fi_lock.
